gates.justification: Reference leaves 0 semantic-duplicate active pair(s); the adopted path leaves 10. The adopted path is not strictly fewer, so the gate fails. The candidate's projected state would reach 0, but a projection is not what adoption applies: adopted mode adds its replacement create alongside the canonical planner's create, so both persist and form a duplicate. Scoped memories lost: 0.
gates.name: Semantic duplicate active-memory count decreases materially
gates.threshold: strictly fewer than reference; 0 for the strongest claim

gates.justification: Stale active pairs 6 → 1 (material=True); correct target deactivations 5/11 → 10/11 (material=True). At least one improved materially: True; no regression in the other: True.
gates.name: Supersession accuracy improves materially OR stale active-memory leakage decreases materially
gates.threshold: >=1 case or >=2% relative on one, with no regression in the other

gates.justification: Reference resolves 0/11 targets (the canonical planner emits no transition targets, so it resolves none); adopted resolves 11/11 with 0 wrong. No regression, and every wrong target count is 0.
gates.name: Update-target accuracy is defensible
gates.threshold: regresses by at most 1 case vs reference; every wrong target reviewed

gates.justification: 0 scoped memories were wrongly deactivated across all transition systems.
gates.name: Scoped coexistence is preserved

gates.justification: 0 unrelated memories were changed.
gates.name: Unrelated-memory preservation remains intact

gates.justification: Reference creates 0 positive memories from forget directives; adopted creates 0. Adoption requires strictly lower and 0. Both are already 0 on this corpus, so there is no reduction to demonstrate — the gate cannot be passed on evidence of improvement and is recorded inconclusive rather than passed by intuition.
gates.name: Forget-directive creation false positives decrease
gates.threshold: strictly lower than reference and 0 for adoption

gates.justification: Forget target correctness 4 → 4 and preservation 4 → 4 across 4 affirmative directives.
gates.name: Correct forget behavior does not regress
gates.threshold: detection, correct-target, and no-op accuracies do not regress

gates.justification: state_corruption measured 0 across every evaluated system and case.
gates.name: State corruption remains 0

gates.justification: forgotten_leakage measured 0 across every evaluated system and case.
gates.name: Forgotten memories remain excluded

gates.justification: superseded_leakage measured 0 across every evaluated system and case.
gates.name: Superseded current-mode memories remain excluded

gates.justification: lineage_errors measured 0 across every evaluated system and case.
gates.name: Supersession lineage is preserved

gates.justification: 0 ambiguous cases were guessed into a mutation.
gates.name: Ambiguous transitions fail closed
gates.threshold: ambiguous rejection does not regress; no ambiguous target guessed

gates.justification: selection_rate 1.0 → 1.0 (absolute 0.0, relative 0.0); material=False, regression=False.
gates.name: Downstream retrieval and selection do not materially regress

gates.justification: context_tokens 17 → 17 (absolute 0, relative 0.0); material=False, regression=False.
gates.name: Context token use does not materially regress

gates.justification: Transition adds well under the 5 ms mean ceiling per interaction over the reference. Exact milliseconds are recorded in latency.json rather than here: they are not byte-reproducible, and embedding them would make the committed gate artifact nondeterministic.
gates.name: Latency remains acceptable for the demo
gates.threshold: <= 5 ms mean added per interaction over the reference

gates.justification: 28/28 candidate proposals carry structured diagnostics.
gates.name: Diagnostics explain every transition decision
gates.threshold: before/after fields and a decision reason present per case

gates.justification: Two independent runs produced identical deterministic content (1 runs compared); the benchmark uses the mock provider and no network.
gates.name: Default tests remain offline and deterministic

gates.justification: Both optional systems report unavailable with a reason and receive no synthetic score.
gates.name: Optional learned paths skip cleanly when unavailable

gates.justification: 20 of 20 bound-field mismatches failed closed; unauthorized applications: 0.
gates.name: Authorization matches the exact controller, mode, source, transition type, and verified proposal

gates.justification: 0 second mutation paths; every applied action passed through the engine's existing admission and application path.
gates.name: No second durable mutation path exists

rationale: every blocking safety gate passes, but one or more quality gates fail: gate 1 (Semantic duplicate active-memory count decreases materially). Candidate mode remains non-mutating, so the path may keep running for diagnostics and candidate translation without affecting canonical state.
